sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95830" key="speiro/pwlis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπειρόπωλις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95830.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for the sale of old clothes</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ς. ἀγορά</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the old clothes market</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
